name: oac-bnotk-xnp
description: Installable notary-side XNP gate for Online HRA workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Installable notary-side prerequisite for Online HRA.
interface.longDescription: Installable local Codex plugin for notaries and notary-office workstations. It gates Online HRA and other notary-side register workflows by checking local XNP readiness, current local authentication and Amtstaetigkeitskontext attestation, XNotar/register-package handoff readiness, API-key presence attestation and evidence flow while keeping XNP credentials out of SaaS and Git.
defaultPrompt: Check XNP readiness for a notary-side Online HRA workflow.
Create a local XNP authentication gate plan.
Validate XNotar handoff readiness without credential values.
